steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a "most logically completes the text" question. The passage ends by stating that linocut printing "supported her aim to unite Black women through her art" — that phrase is the decisive clue that must be echoed in the correct choice.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Linocut printing involved using materials that were readily available to Catlett.: The passage describes the linocut process but never mentions material availability. ✗
  • Choice B — Linocut printing helped Catlett use art to connect people, especially Black women.: Directly restates the passage's claim that linocut "supported her aim to unite Black women through her art." ✓
  • Choice C — Catlett became commercially successful once she started using linocut printing.: The passage says linocut "enabled Catlett's work to reach a wide audience," but commercial success is never mentioned. ✗
  • Choice D — Catlett was one of the first Black artists to use linocut printing.: No claim about being among the first is made anywhere in the passage. ✗
That is the correct answer.
